description: List pending device drafts (covers `neomind device drafts list` — the auto-discovery path, previously uncovered)

turns.user: Some new devices have reported data via webhook but aren't registered yet. List the current pending device drafts and tell me how to promote them.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent calls `neomind device drafts list` (or GET /api/devices/drafts) and explains the approve/reject flow
expectations.overall: Must actually query drafts (empty list is valid) and describe the approve path
